description_cn: 808 Festival 是泰国曼谷的重要电子舞曲音乐节，自 2013 年起成为当地一年一度的 EDM 盛事，通常在 12 月举办，吸引众多国际 DJ 和音乐爱好者。节日融合 House、Techno、Trap 等风格，现场有大型舞台和灯光秀。
description_en: 808 Festival is a major electronic dance music event in Bangkok, Thailand, established around 2013 and held annually in December. It features international DJs, house, techno, trap and other EDM genres on massive stages with energetic production.

name_cn: A State Of Trance 音乐节
description_cn: A State Of Trance Festival 是全球知名 Trance 音乐节品牌，由 Armin van Buuren 主导，以庆祝电子 Trance 文化为核心，每年在荷兰鹿特丹等地举办，并延展至全球多个城市。
description_en: A State Of Trance Festival is a globally recognized trance music festival brand led by Armin van Buuren. It celebrates trance music culture and is held annually in venues such as Rotterdam Ahoy among other locations around the world.

description_cn: Amsterdam Music Festival（AMF）是荷兰阿姆斯特丹在 ADE（Amsterdam Dance Event）期间举办的大型电子音乐节，通常在 Johan Cruijff Arena 举行，内容包括 House、Trance 和 Dance 等风格。
description_en: Amsterdam Music Festival (AMF) is a large electronic music event held in Amsterdam, Netherlands during the Amsterdam Dance Event (ADE), featuring house, trance and dance genres at Johan Cruijff Arena.

description_cn: ARC Music Festival 是美国芝加哥的电子音乐节，侧重 House 和 Techno 音乐，通常在劳动节周末于 Union Park 举办，自 2021 年起成为本地代表性 EDM 活动。
description_en: ARC Music Festival is an electronic music festival in Chicago, USA focusing on house and techno genres. Held at Union Park over Labor Day weekend since 2021, it has become a notable event in Chicago's EDM scene.

description_cn: AVA Festival（Audio Visual Arts Festival）是北爱尔兰贝尔法斯特的电子音乐与视觉艺术节，自 2015 年起举办，融合 Electro、House、Techno 等风格及视听艺术活动。
description_en: AVA Festival (Audio Visual Arts Festival) is an electronic music and visual arts festival in Belfast, Northern Ireland, launched in 2015. It features electronic genres including house, techno and visual art experiences.

description_cn: Airbeat One 是在德国 Neustadt-Glewe 空军基地举办的大型 EDM 音乐节，自 2002 年起吸引众多国际电子音乐爱好者，以主题舞台和多舞台设置著称。
description_en: Airbeat One is a major electronic dance music festival held at an airfield in Neustadt-Glewe, Germany since 2002. It features themed shows and multiple stages attracting EDM fans from around the world.

description_cn: Awakenings 是荷兰著名的 Techno 音乐节品牌，以其规模宏大的 Techno 活动而闻名，在阿姆斯特丹及世界各地举办室内外活动。
description_en: Awakenings is a renowned techno music event brand from the Netherlands, known for its large-scale techno events held in Amsterdam and worldwide.

description_cn: BEONIX Festival 是塞浦路斯利马索尔的一场多人舞台电子音乐节，在 9 月份举行，涵盖 House、Techno 等多个音乐风格及派对体验。
description_en: BEONIX Festival is an electronic music festival held in Limassol, Cyprus, usually in September, featuring house, techno and immersive party experiences.

description_cn: Baum Festival 是哥伦比亚波哥大举办的电子音乐节，自约 2015 年起成为当地重要的电子文化节，重点是 Techno、House 和相关子流派。
description_en: Baum Festival is an electronic music festival in Bogotá, Colombia, established around 2015. It focuses on techno, house and related electronic music subgenres.

description_cn: Beats for Love 是捷克奥斯特拉发举办的年度电子舞曲音乐节，自 2013 年起在 Dolní Vítkovice 工业区举行，是中欧最大的电子音乐节之一，覆盖 Drum & Bass、House、Techno 等多种电子风格，吸引来自世界各地的 EDM 爱好者。
description_en: Beats for Love is an annual electronic dance music festival held in the Dolní Vítkovice industrial area in Ostrava, Czech Republic since 2013. It is one of Central Europe's largest electronic music festivals, featuring drum & bass, house, techno and other electronic genres.
frequency_cn: 每年一届（通常七月第一个周末）

description_cn: Beyond The Valley 是澳大利亚的全体验音乐节，通常在新年期间（12 月 28 日–1 月 1 日）举行，融合多种音乐风格、户外露营、现场活动、工作坊和文化项目，阵容包括电子、嘻哈等多种类艺人。
description_en: Beyond The Valley is an Australian full-experience music festival typically held from December 28 to January 1 over the New Year period. It blends multiple music genres with outdoor camping, workshops, cultural activities and world-class artist lineups.

description_cn: Blacklist Festival 是国际电子舞曲品牌 Blacklist 推出的系列音乐派对/节日，通常融合 House、Techno、Tech House 等多种电子音乐风格，在不同城市举办巡演性质的活动。
description_en: Blacklist Festival is a series of electronic dance music events by the Blacklist brand, often featuring house, techno, tech-house and other EDM genres in various cities.

description_cn: Bonnaroo 是美国田纳西州曼彻斯特举办的年度大型音乐与艺术节，自 2002 年起每年六月在 Great Stage Park 'The Farm' 农场举行，涵盖摇滚、流行、电子、嘻哈等多种音乐风格，并配有艺术装置和露营体验。
description_en: Bonnaroo Music & Arts Festival is an annual large-scale music and arts event held in June at Great Stage Park ('The Farm') in Manchester, Tennessee, USA. Founded in 2002, it features diverse genres including rock, pop, electronic and hip-hop alongside art installations and camping.

description_cn: Boomtown（又称 Boomtown Fair）是英国大型沉浸式音乐节，始于 2009 年，通常八月在英格兰汉普郡 Winchester 附近的 Matterley Estate 举行。该节融合剧场式场景、多个音乐舞台和沉浸式故事体验。
description_en: Boomtown Festival (also known as Boomtown Fair) is a large immersive music festival in the UK, founded in 2009. Held annually in August at Matterley Estate near Winchester, Hampshire, it combines theatrical storytelling, multiple music stages and immersive experiences.

description_cn: Burning Man 不是传统商业音乐节，而是一个在美国内华达州黑岩沙漠建立的临时社区活动，自 1986 年起每年在沙漠中展开长达约九天的艺术、文化与自我表达庆典，以燃烧大型雕像的核心仪式闻名。
description_en: Burning Man is not a conventional commercial music festival but an annual cultural event in the Black Rock Desert, Nevada, USA, since 1986. It builds a temporary community for art, self-expression and culture, famous for its symbolic burning of a large wooden effigy.

description_cn: CRSSD Festival 是美国加利福尼亚圣地亚哥滨水公园举行的电子音乐节，通常春季和秋季各有一届，汇聚 House、Techno、Live 等音乐人演出，还融合美食与艺术装置。
description_en: CRSSD Festival is an electronic music festival held at Waterfront Park in San Diego, California, with spring and fall editions featuring house, techno and live electronic music along with culinary and art experiences.

name_en: Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival
description_cn: Coachella 是美国加利福尼亚科切拉谷的年度音乐与艺术节，自 1999 年起每年春季在印第奥举行，融合多种摇滚、流行、电音等风格，并配有大型艺术装置与露营体验，是全球最具影响力音乐节之一。
description_en: The Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival is an annual music and arts event held each spring in Indio, California, USA since 1999. It blends rock, pop, electronic music and large art installations, and is one of the world's most influential festivals.

description_cn: Creamfields 是英国知名 EDM 音乐节，始于 1998 年，主要在英格兰柴郡 Daresbury 举行，并衍生出多个国际站点，是全球电子音乐的重要传统节日之一。
description_en: Creamfields is a renowned British EDM festival founded in 1998, primarily held at Daresbury in Cheshire, England, with international spin-offs in several countries, making it a major tradition in electronic music.

description_cn: Creamfields Chile 是 Creamfields 在智利的官方站点音乐节，于每年十月份在圣地亚哥 Club Hípico 举办，是该国最大规模的电子音乐节之一，将国际 EDM 艺人汇聚一堂。
description_en: Creamfields Chile is the Chilean edition of the Creamfields festival, held annually in October at Club Hípico in Santiago. It is one of the largest electronic music events in the country featuring international EDM artists.

description_cn: DGTL Festival 是荷兰阿姆斯特丹起源的电子音乐与创意艺术节，始于 2013 年，以可持续理念和多舞台音乐阵容著称，在 NDSM Docklands 举办，并且有全球多个城市分站。
description_en: DGTL Festival is an electronic music and creative arts festival originating in Amsterdam, Netherlands, since 2013. Known for sustainability and multi-stage music showcases, its main event is held at NDSM Docklands with editions in various global cities.

description_cn: Defected Croatia 是英国 Defected Records 旗下的海边 House 音乐节，在克罗地亚 Adriatic 海岸的 Tisno Garden Resort 举办，汇聚世界级 House DJ 与舞者，以及海滩派对、船上派对等多种活动。
description_en: Defected Croatia is a house music festival presented by Defected Records, held at The Garden Resort in Tisno on the Adriatic coast, featuring world-class DJs, beach sets, boat parties and vibrant house music culture.

description_cn: Defected Malta 是 Defected Records 在地中海马耳他举办的 House 音乐节，每年十月吸引大量家族派对与俱乐部场景的 DJ 演出。
description_en: Defected Malta is a house music festival hosted by Defected Records on the Mediterranean island of Malta each October, featuring day and night parties at multiple venues.
city_cn: 马耳他 Attard / 圣保罗湾

description_cn: Defqon.1 是由荷兰 Q-dance 主办的硬风格 Hardstyle 音乐节，自 2003 年起在荷兰 Biddinghuizen 的活动场地举行，是世界上最具规模的硬舞音乐节之一。
description_en: Defqon.1 Weekend Festival is a hardstyle and hard dance music festival organized by Dutch promoter Q-dance, held annually in Biddinghuizen, Netherlands, and is one of the world's largest hard dance events.

description_cn: Dekmantel Festival 是荷兰阿姆斯特丹举办的先锋电子音乐节，以高水准的 Techno、House 和创新音乐阵容著称，并吸引全球音乐爱好者参与。
description_en: Dekmantel Festival is an avant-electronic music festival held in Amsterdam, Netherlands, known for its high-quality lineups of techno, house and eclectic electronic music, attracting a global audience.

description_cn: Dimensions Festival 是位于克罗地亚的室内/室外电子音乐节，融合 Techno、House、Drum & Bass 等多种风格，自 2012 年起成为评点类音乐节重要成员，并以多舞台和海边场景著称。
description_en: Dimensions Festival is an electronic music festival in Croatia, blending techno, house, drum & bass and more across indoor and outdoor stages, known for its seaside setting and immersive programming since its inception in 2012.
city_cn: 提斯诺 / 克罗地亚多地

description_cn: Djakarta Warehouse Project（DWP）是印度尼西亚雅加达的大型电子舞曲音乐节，自 2010 年起每年 12 月举行，是东南亚最大规模的 EDM 节日之一，汇集国际艺人在多个舞台演出。
description_en: Djakarta Warehouse Project (DWP) is a major electronic dance music festival held annually in Jakarta, Indonesia each December, and is one of Southeast Asia's largest EDM events featuring international artists.

description_cn: EDC China 是全球知名 Electric Daisy Carnival（EDC）音乐节在中国的分站，由 Insomniac 推出，融合 EDM、House、Techno 等风格，是亚洲最大电子舞曲盛会之一。
description_en: EDC China is the China edition of the globally acclaimed Electric Daisy Carnival organized by Insomniac, featuring a wide range of EDM, house, and techno artists and productions, and is one of Asia's largest dance music festivals.

description_cn: EDC Las Vegas 是由 Insomniac 主办的全球最大规模电子舞曲节之一，在美国内华达州拉斯维加斯 Motor Speedway 举办，融合多舞台音乐、灯光、艺术装置和嘉年华体验。
description_en: EDC Las Vegas is one of the world's biggest electronic music festivals produced by Insomniac, held at Las Vegas Motor Speedway in Nevada, USA, featuring multiple stages, carnival rides, art installations and top EDM artists.

description_cn: EDC Mexico 是 Electric Daisy Carnival 在墨西哥城的分站，作为全球 EDM 品牌的一部分，吸引大量电子舞曲爱好者参与。
description_en: EDC Mexico is the Mexico City edition of Electric Daisy Carnival, part of the global EDC brand that draws large crowds of electronic dance music fans to Mexico.

description_cn: EDC Orlando 是 Electric Daisy Carnival 在美国佛罗里达奥兰多举办的电子舞曲音乐节，由 Insomniac 主办，融合多舞台演出、游乐设施和沉浸式灯光艺术体验。
description_en: EDC Orlando is the Orlando, Florida edition of the Electric Daisy Carnival produced by Insomniac, featuring multiple stages, carnival rides, and immersive light and art experiences.

description_cn: EDC Thailand 是 Electric Daisy Carnival 在泰国普吉岛举办的电子舞曲音乐节，结合沙滩风光与顶级 DJ 演出，为亚洲 EDM 爱好者打造独特节日体验。
description_en: EDC Thailand is the Thailand edition of Electric Daisy Carnival held in Phuket, combining beach scenery and top DJ performances into a unique EDM festival experience.

description_cn: EXIT 音乐节最初是在塞尔维亚诺维萨德的 Petrovaradin 堡垒举办的大型音乐节，融合电子、摇滚和流行音乐等类型，不过 2025 年后主站受多方原因暂停。
description_en: EXIT Festival was a major music festival originally held at Petrovaradin Fortress in Novi Sad, Serbia, featuring electronic, rock, and pop music; however, the flagship event was discontinued after 2025 due to political and logistical issues.

description_cn: Electric Castle 是罗马尼亚举办的音乐节，自 2013 年起在克卢日-纳波卡附近的 Bánffy 城堡举办，融合电子音乐及多种音乐风格，并以艺术和科技装置著称。
description_en: Electric Castle is a Romanian music festival held since 2013 at the Bánffy Castle near Cluj-Napoca, blending electronic music with various genres and featuring art and technology installations.

description_cn: Electric Love 是奥地利著名的电音节，在萨尔茨堡环形赛道举行，吸引大量国际 EDM 艺人和粉丝。
description_en: Electric Love Festival is a well-known Austrian electronic music festival held at the Salzburg Ring racetrack, attracting major international EDM artists and fans.

description_cn: FLY Open Air 是英国电子音乐节，于苏格兰格拉斯哥和爱丁堡等地多个户外场地举办，融合 House、Techno 等电子风格，并以城市中的开阔场景著称。
description_en: FLY Open Air Festival is a UK electronic music festival held in outdoor venues in Scotland such as Glasgow and Edinburgh, showcasing house, techno and other electronic music styles.

description_cn: 格拉斯顿伯里音乐节是英国最具标志性的户外音乐与表演艺术节，自 1970 年起在英格兰索美塞特的 Worthy Farm 举办，融合多种音乐与艺术表演，是全球最著名节日之一。
description_en: Glastonbury Festival is the UK's most iconic outdoor music and performing arts festival held since 1970 at Worthy Farm in Somerset, England, featuring diverse music and performance art.

description_cn: Glitch Festival 是马耳他的年度电子音乐节，自 2017 年起举办（2026 年为第 10 周年），在 Gianpula Fields 等场地举行，以 House、Techno、Electro 等多种风格为主，包含泳池派对、洞穴派对、船派对等多元体验，是地中海地区最具影响力的电子音乐节之一。
description_en: Glitch Festival is an annual electronic music festival in Malta since 2017 (celebrating its 10th anniversary in 2026), held at venues including Gianpula Fields, featuring house, techno, electro and more with pool parties, cave raves and boat parties, making it one of the most influential electronic festivals in the Mediterranean.

description_cn: Groove Cruise 是全球性 EDM 音乐巡航节，自 2004 年起从美国多个港口出发，以音乐、舞蹈与航海相结合的体验著称，是世界上最持久的音乐巡航节之一。
description_en: Groove Cruise is a global EDM music cruise festival departing from various U.S. ports since 2004, combining music, dance and travel, and is one of the longest-running music cruise festivals in the world.

description_cn: HARD Summer 是美国西海岸重要的电子音乐节及文化活动品牌之一，自 2008 年起在加利福尼亚洛杉矶地区举行，以多舞台电子与街头文化融合风格著称。
description_en: HARD Summer Music Festival is a major West Coast electronic music festival and cultural event in Los Angeles, California, held since 2008, known for diverse stages and a blend of electronic and live music.

description_cn: Hideout Festival 是克罗地亚 Pag 岛 Zrce 海滩的一年一度电子舞曲音乐节，自 2011 年起举办，融合沙滩派对、船派对、泳池派对及夜间主舞台演出，是欧洲夏季最受欢迎的电音活动之一。
description_en: Hideout Festival is an annual electronic music festival held on Zrce Beach on Pag Island, Croatia since 2011. It features beach parties, boat parties, pool parties and headline night shows, making it one of Europe's most popular summer EDM events.

description_cn: Houghton Festival 是英国诺福克乡村的一项音乐与舞蹈艺术节，注重长时 DJ 演出、定制声系统和视觉装置，在夏季举办并融合户外美景与深度舞曲体验。
description_en: Houghton Festival is a music and dance arts festival in the Norfolk countryside of the UK, known for extended DJ sets, bespoke sound systems, and artistic installations, typically held in August.

description_cn: Kappa FuturFestival 是意大利都灵的一项大型电子音乐节，自 2009 年起每年七月在 Parco Dora 举办，融合 House、Techno 等风格，被誉为欧洲重要的电音节日之一。
description_en: Kappa FuturFestival is a major electronic music festival in Turin, Italy, held annually since 2009 at Parco Dora. Featuring house, techno and more, it is regarded as one of Europe's prominent EDM events.

description_cn: Les Plages Électroniques 是法国海滨电音节，通常在夏季于法国海岸举办，融合 House、Techno、Electro 等电子风格，并以海滨派对体验著称。
description_en: Les Plages Électroniques is a beachfront electronic music festival in France, typically held in summer on the French coast, featuring house, techno and electro music with seaside party experiences.

description_cn: Lollapalooza 是美国著名的多风格音乐节，始于 1991 年，在芝加哥 Grant Park 举办，融合 Alternative、摇滚、电音、嘻哈等多种音乐风格，并衍生出全球多个分站。
description_en: Lollapalooza is a major multi-genre music festival founded in 1991 in Chicago's Grant Park, featuring alternative, rock, electronic, hip-hop and more. It has expanded to several international editions.

description_cn: Lost Lands Festival 是美国俄亥俄州举办的大型 Bass / Dubstep 音乐节，以恐龙主题和重低音风格著称，吸引众多重低音 EDM 粉丝参与。
description_en: Lost Lands Festival is a major bass/dubstep music festival held in Ohio, USA, known for its dinosaur theme and heavy bass lineup, attracting many bass EDM fans.

description_cn: Lost Village Festival 是英国约克郡的户外音乐节，以沉浸式场景、戏剧性演出和多风格阵容闻名，融合电子、独立、舞曲等艺术。
description_en: Lost Village Festival is an outdoor music festival in Yorkshire, UK known for immersive settings, theatrical performances and diverse music lineups including electronic and indie genres.

description_cn: Love International 是克罗地亚的一项电子音乐节，通常在海滨度假区举办，融合深 House、Techno 等风格，注重艺术及社区体验。
description_en: Love International Festival is an electronic music festival in Croatia, typically held at a seaside resort with deep house, techno and community-oriented experiences.

description_cn: Lovefest 是塞尔维亚的一项户外音乐节，以电子及流行舞曲为主，融合多个舞台与活动，是巴尔干地区具代表性的节日之一。
description_en: Lovefest is an outdoor music festival in Serbia featuring electronic and pop dance music across multiple stages, and is one of the region's representative events.

description_cn: Loveland Festival 是荷兰阿姆斯特丹的电子音乐与文化活动品牌，举办多场 EDM、House、Techno 派对及节日活动。
description_en: Loveland Festival is an electronic music and culture event brand in Amsterdam, Netherlands hosting multiple EDM, house and techno parties and festival events.

description_cn: Medusa Sunbeach Festival 是西班牙瓦伦西亚附近 Cullera 海滩举办的大型电子音乐节，自 2014 年起举办，融合 EDM、House、Techno、Hardstyle 等风格，以宏大的海滩主舞台和壮观灯光烟火秀著称，每届吸引逾 30 万观众，是西班牙规模最大的电子音乐节之一。
description_en: Medusa Sunbeach Festival is a large electronic music festival held on Cullera Beach near Valencia, Spain since 2014, featuring EDM, house, techno and hardstyle with spectacular beach stages, light shows and pyrotechnics, drawing over 300,000 attendees and ranking as one of Spain's largest electronic music festivals.

description_cn: Monegros Desert Festival 是西班牙阿拉贡 Monegros 沙漠的一项传奇电子音乐节，自 1994 年起举办。节日以极端环境中超长现场体验著称，融合 Techno、House、Drum & Bass 等多种风格，打造临时的"Technopolis"音乐城，是欧洲最具标志性电子音乐活动之一。
description_en: Monegros Desert Festival is a legendary electronic music festival held in the Monegros Desert, Aragon, Spain since 1994. Known for its extreme environment and extended live experiences, blending techno, house, drum & bass and more, creating a temporary 'technopolis' in the desert.

description_cn: Movement Electronic Music Festival 是美国密歇根州底特律举办的年度电子音乐节，发源于 Techno 的故乡底特律，以
（DEMF）之名始于 2000 年，2006 年起正式以 Movement 之名延续至今，在 Hart Plaza 劳动节周末举行，是全球最具影响力的 Techno 与 House 音乐节之一。
description_en: Movement Electronic Music Festival is an annual electronic music event held at Hart Plaza in Detroit, Michigan, USA. Originating as the Detroit Electronic Music Festival (DEMF) in 2000 and operating under the Movement name since 2006, it is held each Memorial Day weekend and is one of the world's most influential techno and house festivals.
frequency_cn: 每年一届（五月劳动节周末）

description_cn: Mysteryland 是荷兰历史最悠久的电子音乐节，由 ID&T 于 1993 年创办，被誉为世界上持续时间最长的舞曲音乐节，在 Haarlemmermeer 的 Haarlemmermeerse Bos 举办，融合 Techno、House、Trance、Hardstyle 等多种电子风格。注：2025 年版暂停，计划 2027 年回归。
description_en: Mysteryland is the Netherlands' oldest and the world's longest-running electronic music festival, founded by ID&T in 1993, held at Haarlemmermeerse Bos in Haarlemmermeer, featuring techno, house, trance, hardstyle and more. Note: the 2025 edition was paused; return planned for 2027.
frequency_cn: 每年一届（八月底，2027年回归）

description_cn: NEON Countdown 是泰国曼谷的跨年电子音乐节，由 NEON Events 主办，自 2015 年起每年在 12 月 30–31 日于 Wonder World Extreme Park 举办，以国际顶级 EDM 艺人演出和新年倒计时狂欢著称，是亚洲规模最大的跨年电子音乐节之一。
description_en: NEON Countdown is a New Year's Eve electronic music festival in Bangkok, Thailand, organized by NEON Events since 2015. Held on December 30–31 at Wonder World Extreme Park, it features top international EDM artists and is one of Asia's largest New Year countdown EDM events.

description_cn: Nameless Music Festival 是意大利科莫湖 Lecco 附近举办的大型电子音乐节，自 2013 年起每年六月在 Annone di Brianza（2026年起改在 Lecco Nameless Park）举行，融合 EDM、House、Techno 等风格，以壮丽的阿尔卑斯湖泊自然风光与多舞台演出著称，是意大利最受欢迎的电子音乐节之一。
description_en: Nameless Music Festival is a major electronic music festival near Lake Como in northern Italy, held annually since 2013 in June at Annone di Brianza (relocated to Nameless Park, Lecco from 2026). Featuring EDM, house and techno across multiple stages set against Alpine lake scenery, it is one of Italy's most popular electronic music festivals.

description_cn: Neopop Festival 是葡萄牙维亚纳堡举办的电子音乐节，前身为 Anti-Pop Festival，自 2006 年起举办，以极简主义 Techno 与实验电子音乐为核心，每年八月在大西洋海岸的 Santiago da Barra 堡垒举行，是葡萄牙最重要的 Techno 音乐节，2026 年庆祝创办 20 周年。
description_en: Neopop Festival is an electronic music festival in Viana do Castelo, Portugal, formerly known as Anti-Pop Festival, founded in 2006. Focused on techno and experimental electronic music, held each August at Forte de Santiago da Barra on the Atlantic coast; celebrating its 20th anniversary in 2026.

description_cn: Neversea Festival 是罗马尼亚康斯坦察海滨举办的大型电子音乐节，融合 EDM、House、Techno、Trance 等风格，吸引大量国际艺人和乐迷参与。
description_en: Neversea Festival is a major electronic music festival held on the beach at Constanța, Romania, featuring EDM, house, techno, trance and other genres and attracting international artists and fans.

description_cn: Nibirii Festival 是斯洛伐克布拉迪斯拉发的电子音乐节，融合 House、Techno、Breaks 等风格，为当地和国际电音爱好者提供多舞台体验。
description_en: Nibirii Festival is an electronic music event in Bratislava, Slovakia, featuring house, techno, breaks and other electronic genres with multiple stages for local and international fans.

description_cn: Outlook Origins 是英国与欧洲多个城市举办的电子音乐项目，通常以 Outlook 品牌为基础展开派对和节日活动，融合 Dub、Bass、House 等风格。
description_en: Outlook Origins refers to a series of electronic music events associated with the Outlook brand across the UK and Europe, featuring dub, bass, house and other electronic music styles.

description_cn: PAROOKAVILLE 是德国韦泽的电子音乐节，以其独特的节日城市体验闻名，覆盖 EDM、House、Techno 等风格，设有主题区和多舞台演出，自 2015 年起举办。
description_en: PAROOKAVILLE is an electronic music festival in Weeze, Germany since 2015, known for its unique festival city experience, featuring EDM, house, techno and multiple themed stage areas.

description_cn: POSITIV Festival 是瑞士苏黎世的电子音乐节，融合多种 EDM 风格及文化活动，为电音爱好者打造沉浸式体验。
description_en: POSITIV Festival is an electronic music festival in Zurich, Switzerland featuring a mix of EDM genres and cultural activities for electronic music lovers.

description_cn: Panorama Festival 是位于美国纽约的大型多风格音乐与艺术节，融合流行、独立、电子等音乐，常设多个舞台和文化活动。
description_en: Panorama Festival is a large multi-genre music and arts festival in New York City, USA, featuring pop, indie, electronic and diverse music genres with multiple stages and cultural programming.

description_cn: Parklife Festival 是英国曼彻斯特的年度音乐节，融合流行、独立、电子、Hip-Hop 等多种风格，拥有丰富的舞台经验与文化活动，自 2010 年起举办。
description_en: Parklife Festival is an annual music festival in Manchester, UK since 2010, featuring pop, indie, electronic, hip-hop and other genres with rich stage experiences and cultural programming.

description_cn: Pitch Music & Arts Festival 是澳大利亚维多利亚州举办的户外音乐节，融合 Indie、Electronic、Rock 等风格，拥有多个舞台及文化体验。
description_en: Pitch Music & Arts Festival is an outdoor music festival in Victoria, Australia, featuring indie, electronic, rock and other genres with multiple stages and cultural experiences.

description_cn: Primavera Sound 是西班牙巴塞罗那大型音乐节，自 2001 年起每年五月底至六月初在 Parc del Fòrum 举办，以多风格音乐阵容著称，被誉为欧洲最重要的音乐节之一。电子、独立、摇滚、流行等风格并存。
description_en: Primavera Sound is a major music festival held annually in late May to early June at Parc del Fòrum in Barcelona, Spain, since 2001. It is one of Europe's most important music festivals featuring a wide range of genres from electronic and indie to rock and pop.
frequency_cn: 每年一届（五月底/六月初）

description_cn: Primer Music Festival 是一项较新的音乐活动品牌，通常聚焦多种音乐风格（含电子），官方资料较少，需以具体届次信息为准整理。
description_en: Primer Music Festival is a newer music event brand featuring diverse music styles including electronic genres. Public official information is limited and specific details depend on individual editions.

description_cn: Ravolution Music Festival 是越南重要的电子音乐节品牌之一，始于 2016 年，由 Ravolution Asia 推动，曾在胡志明市和河内举办多届国际 DJ 演出，被视为推动本地区电子音乐文化发展的标志性活动。
description_en: Ravolution Music Festival is a major electronic music festival brand in Vietnam, established in 2016 by Ravolution Asia. It has hosted multiple editions in Ho Chi Minh City and Hanoi with international DJs and is seen as a key event in the region's electronic music culture.
frequency_cn: 多次/不固定（视届次而定）

name_en: S2O Hong Kong Songkran Music Festival
description_cn: S2O 香港泼水音乐节是泰国著名泼水节音乐活动在香港的分站，将泼水传统与电子音乐表演结合，在维多利亚港中环海滨活动空间举行的夏季盛事，集音乐和水战互动于一体。
description_en: S2O Hong Kong Songkran Music Festival is the Hong Kong edition of the famous Thailand Songkran water and music festival. Combining water-splashing traditions with electronic music performances, it takes place at the Central Harbourfront Event Space.

description_cn: S2O Songkran Music Festival 是世界著名的泼水电子音乐节，融合泰国传统泼水节文化与国际 EDM 表演，每年四月在曼谷举行三天的狂欢，是亚洲最具特色的音乐节活动之一。
description_en: S2O Songkran Music Festival is a world-renowned water-splash electronic music festival blending Thailand's Songkran water traditions with international EDM performances. It is held annually in April in Bangkok over three days.

description_cn: S2O 台湾泼水音乐节是泰国泼水音乐节在台湾的分站活动，于台北大佳河滨公园举办两日盛典，结合水上互动与电子音乐演出，为本地与国际观众打造独特节日体验。
description_en: S2O Taiwan Songkran Music Festival is the Taiwan edition of the Thai Songkran water music festival, held over two days at Dajia Riverside Park in Taipei, combining water interactions with electronic music performances.

description_cn: SAGA Festival 是罗马尼亚的电子音乐节品牌之一，在当地举办多种 EDM 活动，覆盖多个舞台和音乐风格。
description_en: SAGA Festival is an electronic music event brand in Romania featuring EDM acts across multiple stages. Official details may vary by edition.

description_cn: Siam Songkran Music Festival 是泰国曼谷结合传统泼水节和 EDM 音乐的大型节庆活动，每年四月于 Bravo BKK 举行，吸引国际 DJ 演出并融合水战互动体验。
description_en: Siam Songkran Music Festival is a large-scale EDM event in Bangkok, Thailand that combines the traditional water-splashing Songkran celebration with electronic music performances, held annually in April at Bravo BKK.

description_cn: STORM Festival 是电子舞曲相关的节日活动名称之一，在多地会以派对/音乐节形式出现，具体内容受届次影响。
description_en: STORM Festival refers to electronic music events branded as STORM in various locations. Specific details vary by edition.

description_cn: SUNSET By NEON 是马来西亚云顶高原举办的多日电子音乐节，特色包括山地场景、国际艺人阵容和多舞台演出，由 NEON Events（NEON Countdown 主办方）出品。
description_en: SUNSET By NEON is a multi-day electronic music festival held in the Genting Highlands, Malaysia, with international act lineups and multiple stage performances, produced by NEON Events (organizers of NEON Countdown).

description_cn: Sea Star Festival 是由 EXIT Festival 团队组织的克罗地亚音乐节，于 Umag 的 Stella Maris 海滨度假区举办，融合电子、摇滚、流行等风格的多舞台演出，是欧洲夏季的开场音乐活动之一，自 2017 年起举办。
description_en: Sea Star Festival is a Croatian music festival organized by the team behind EXIT Festival since 2017, held at the Stella Maris seaside resort in Umag, featuring multiple stages of electronic, rock, pop and other genres, marking the start of the European summer festival season.

description_cn: Snowbombing 是在奥地利 Mayrhofen 雪场举行的冬季电子和现场音乐节，融合滑雪、户外演出和山地派对等体验，每年春季吸引全球 EDM 和滑雪爱好者，自 2000 年起举办。
description_en: Snowbombing is a winter electronic and live music festival held in the ski resort of Mayrhofen, Austria since 2000, combining skiing, outdoor performances, and mountain parties, drawing EDM and snow sports fans each spring.

description_cn: Sonus Festival 是克罗地亚 Pag 岛 Zrće 海滩的电子音乐节，以海滩派对、船上派对和夜间演出闻名，聚集 Techno 和 House DJ 阵容，是欧洲夏季最受欢迎的电音活动之一，自 2013 年起举办。
description_en: Sonus Festival is an electronic music festival on Zrće Beach on Pag Island in Croatia since 2013, known for beach parties, boat parties, and night performances with techno and house DJ lineups, making it one of Europe's most popular summer EDM events.

description_cn: Soundstorm 是沙特阿拉伯大型电子音乐节品牌之一，在利雅得等地举办多舞台 EDM 活动，吸引国际和本地艺人。
description_en: Soundstorm is a major electronic music festival brand in Saudi Arabia hosting multi-stage EDM events in Riyadh and beyond, featuring international and regional artists.

description_cn: Sunburn Festival 是印度最大的电子舞曲节日之一，自 2007 年起在印度举办，曾在 Goa、Pune 和 Mumbai 等地举行，吸引全球 EDM 艺人和粉丝。
description_en: Sunburn Festival is one of India's largest electronic dance music festivals held since 2007 in Goa, Pune and Mumbai, featuring global EDM artists and drawing large crowds.

description_cn: Sziget Festival 是匈牙利布达佩斯奥布达岛举办的大型多风格音乐节，自 1993 年起每年夏季举行，涵盖电子、摇滚、流行等多个音乐流派，吸引全球观众。
description_en: Sziget Festival is a major multi-genre music festival held annually each summer since 1993 on Óbuda Island in Budapest, Hungary, featuring electronic, rock, pop and various music genres attracting global audiences.

description_cn: Sónar 是发源于西班牙巴塞罗那的大型电子音乐与音乐科技艺术节，融合前卫电子、实验音乐与数字创新艺术，自 1994 年起举办，在全球多个城市设有分站。
description_en: Sónar is a major electronic music and digital culture festival originating in Barcelona, Spain since 1994, blending avant-garde electronic music, experimental sounds and digital arts, with editions in multiple global cities.

description_cn: Sónar Lisboa 是 Sónar 在葡萄牙里斯本的分站音乐科技与电子音乐节，通常在四月举办，涵盖白天室外、夜间室内多舞台音乐及数字艺术展演。
description_en: Sónar Lisboa is the Lisbon edition of the Sónar electronic music and digital art festival, held in April featuring multiple stages with daytime outdoor and nighttime indoor performances.

description_cn: TMC Festival 是以电子音乐为主的节日活动名称之一，官方信息较少，多以本地派对形式出现，具体届次讯息需以官方公告为准。
description_en: TMC Festival refers to an electronic music event brand with limited public information; specific details vary by edition and location and should be referenced from official announcements.

description_cn: Terminal V 是苏格兰爱丁堡举办的电子音乐节品牌，汇聚多舞台 Techno 与电子艺人演出，2026 届计划在 Royal Highland Centre 举行。
description_en: Terminal V Festival is an electronic music festival held in Edinburgh, Scotland featuring multiple stages with techno and electronic acts, with the 2026 edition planned at the Royal Highland Centre.

description_cn: Time Warp 是德国曼海姆/卡尔斯鲁厄及世界多地举办的先锋 Techno 与电子音乐节，自 1994 年起成为全球 Techno 文化象征之一，具高度舞曲艺术性与技术视觉装置。
description_en: Time Warp is an influential techno and electronic music festival originating in Mannheim/Karlsruhe, Germany since 1994, recognized globally for its high-caliber techno lineups and audiovisual experiences.
city_cn: 曼海姆/卡尔斯鲁厄（及全球巡演）

description_cn: Together Festival 是多地不同命名的音乐活动/派对品牌，常结合电子音乐与夜生活文化，具体信息根据城市站点不同有所差异。
description_en: Together Festival refers to various music event/party brands across different cities often featuring electronic music and nightlife culture; specific details depend on location and edition.

description_cn: Tomorrowland 是比利时 Boom 举办的年度大型电子舞曲节，自 2005 年起成为全球最著名 EDM 节日之一，并衍生出多个国际分站与专题活动。
description_en: Tomorrowland is a major annual electronic dance music festival held in Boom, Belgium since 2005, becoming one of the world's most renowned EDM festivals with various international editions and themed events.

description_cn: Tomorrowland Winter 是 Tomorrowland 的雪山冬季版音乐节，自 2019 年起在法国阿尔卑斯山 Alpe d'Huez 举办，融合 EDM 舞曲与冬季滑雪文化。
description_en: Tomorrowland Winter is the winter edition of Tomorrowland festival, held since 2019 in the French Alps at Alpe d'Huez, combining EDM and snow culture experiences.

description_cn: UNSEEN Festival 是泰国曼谷举办的大型综合电子与现场音乐节，由 One Asia Ventures 主办，自约 2022 年起（2024 年为第三届）在曼谷 UOB Live Hall（Emsphere Mall）举行，融合 EDM、R&B、流行等多种风格，以沉浸式主题体验著称。
description_en: UNSEEN Festival is a large-scale electronic and live music festival in Bangkok, Thailand, organized by One Asia Ventures since around 2022 (3rd edition in 2024), held at UOB Live Hall in Emsphere Mall, featuring EDM, R&B, pop and other genres with immersive themed experiences.

description_cn: UNTOLD 是罗马尼亚克鲁日-纳波卡的大型电子音乐节，自 2015 年起每年八月举行，是欧洲规模最大之一，涵盖 EDM、Trance、House 等多种电子风格。
description_en: UNTOLD Festival is a major electronic music festival held annually in Cluj-Napoca, Romania since 2015, featuring EDM, trance, house and other electronic genres and attracting large international crowds.

description_cn: Ultra Australia 是澳大利亚的电子舞曲节，作为 Ultra Worldwide 的一部分，每年四月在墨尔本及黄金海岸等地举办 EDM 演出，自 2018 年起举办。
description_en: Ultra Australia is the Australian edition of the Ultra Music Festival series, part of Ultra Worldwide, held annually in April since 2018 featuring EDM performances in cities like Melbourne and Gold Coast.

description_cn: Ultra Europe 是全球 Ultra Worldwide 系列的一站，通常在每年七月于克罗地亚斯普利特的 Park Mladeži 举办，为期三天的大型 EDM 音乐节，汇聚世界顶级 DJ 和高品质舞台制作。
description_en: Ultra Europe is part of the global Ultra Worldwide series, a three-day EDM festival held annually in July at Park Mladeži in Split, Croatia, featuring top DJs and high-end production.

description_cn: Ultra Japan 是 Ultra Worldwide 在日本东京举办的 EDM 音乐节，自 2014 年起在东京 Odaiba 举行，为亚洲最知名的电音节之一，包含多舞台及顶级国际艺人阵容。
description_en: Ultra Japan is the Tokyo, Japan edition of the Ultra Worldwide EDM festival, held since 2014 at Tokyo Odaiba Ultra Park and considered one of Asia's major electronic music festivals.

description_cn: Ultra Korea 是 Ultra Worldwide 系列在韩国首尔举办的电子音乐节，自 2012 年起铺开，在室外场地聚集 EDM 爱好者与国际 DJ 演出。
description_en: Ultra Korea is the South Korea edition of the Ultra Worldwide festival held in Seoul since 2012, attracting EDM fans and international artists.

description_cn: Ultra Music Festival 是世界著名的电子舞曲节日，自 1999 年在美国佛罗里达迈阿密举办，成为全球 EDM 文化的重要象征，并衍生出 Ultra Worldwide 系列多个国际站点。
description_en: Ultra Music Festival (UMF) is a world-renowned electronic dance music festival held annually since 1999 in Miami, Florida, USA, and has become a major symbol of global EDM culture, spawning the Ultra Worldwide series.

description_cn: Ultra South Africa 是 Ultra Music Festival 在南非的分站节，始于 2014 年，是非洲最大的电子音乐节之一，在开普敦与约翰内斯堡举办 EDM 活动。
description_en: Ultra South Africa is the South African edition of the Ultra Music Festival series, launched in 2014 and one of Africa's largest electronic music events, held in Cape Town and Johannesburg.
city_cn: 开普敦 / 约翰内斯堡

description_cn: Ultra Taiwan 是 Ultra Worldwide 在台湾台北举办的电子音乐节活动，自 2018 年起在大佳河滨公园举行，成为亚洲 EDM 日历中的重要一站。
description_en: Ultra Taiwan is the Taiwan edition of the Ultra Worldwide electronic music festival held in Taipei since 2018 at Dajia Riverside Park, making it a staple in Asia's EDM calendar.

description_cn: UNTOLD Dubai 是 UNTOLD Festival 在阿联酋迪拜的国际版本，自 2024 年起作为全球扩展站举办，将罗马尼亚 UNTOLD 的创意和演出带到中东。
description_en: UNTOLD Dubai Festival is the international Dubai edition of Untold Festival, launched in 2024 as part of Untold's global expansion, bringing the creative concept and performances from the Romanian festival to the Middle East.

description_cn: VAC Music Festival 是中国本土大型电子音乐节品牌 Vision & Colour，自 2018 年起在珠海举办多场大型电子活动，并跻身世界音乐节百强。
description_en: VAC Music Festival (Vision & Colour) is a major Chinese electronic music festival brand founded in 2018, with large events held in Zhuhai and ranked among the world's top music festivals.

description_cn: VELD Music Festival 是加拿大多伦多举办的年度电子舞曲节，自 2012 年起在 Downsview Park 举行，为加拿大最大 EDM 节日之一，吸引诸多国际 DJ 演出。
description_en: VELD Music Festival is an annual electronic dance music festival held in Downsview Park, Toronto, Canada since 2012, and is one of Canada's largest EDM events featuring many international DJs.

description_cn: World Club Dome 是德国法兰克福举办的大型电子音乐节，由 BigCityBeats 电台主办，自 2013 年起每年六月初举行，被誉为
，汇聚超多舞台与国际 DJ。
description_en: World Club Dome is a major electronic music festival held annually in Frankfurt, Germany since 2013, organized by BigCityBeats radio and known as the 'Biggest Club in the World,' featuring numerous stages and international DJs.

description_cn: World DJ Festival 是发源于韩国、历史悠久的 EDM 音乐节，自 2007 年起每年在首尔及其他场所举行，并于日本等地扩展举办。
description_en: World DJ Festival is an EDM music festival originating in South Korea since 2007, held annually in Seoul and other locations, with expanded editions such as World DJ Festival Japan.
city_cn: 首尔 / 日本千叶（分站）
